caveat: AGENT-JUDGED single-annotator reclassification of the m0b molecule class (Claude Fable 5); criteria in this file; same epistemic status as m0b itself (±few points). Committed m0b results untouched; only class=molecule rows reclassified.

ceilings.convention: content-mass ceilings are % of top-500 content mass (80.35% of content mass classified; long tail skews concrete/named => generous, same as m0b); all-token ceilings apply the 45.55% content share, same convention as the m0b ~26% number

rows.note: a child that can be a woman after a long time — NSM's own derivation over the child/woman molecules
functional kind: a thing people make for children to do things with for pleasure; function IS the identity, so explication (not minting) is the honest tier
move far above the ground, in the sky, like a bird moves
counted as jump-synonym: dominant TinyStories use is rabbit/child hopping (small jumps); weakest synonym call
arguably never needed a molecule ('nothing bad on it'); m0b classed it molecule via the scrubbing-activity sense
teeth [m] unminted; NSM bites with teeth
make music with the mouth/say words like music — NSM might well molecule this; kept clear because the differentia is fully functional
calendar unit; 'very many days' would be dishonest
playground artifact: a thing children sit on that moves one way then the other; motion verb sense explicable with MOVE
same functional-artifact logic as chair-via-sit; consistency with chair/table calls
touch-percept quality; prime-only sketch ('parts of it move when the body touches it')
color kind (sun prototype available but unminted in v0 — next-100 candidate)
color kind (grass/tree prototype available but unminted in v0 — next-100 candidate)
prime-only sketch ('it moves, people feel it on the body, small things move because of it'); m0b classed it weather-molecule
taste quality; needs sugar/honey-style prototype molecule
highly polysemous light verb; phrasal uses dominate (m0b's own note)
under-determined artifact kind (flat-top essence needs shape molecules)
the part of the day a short time after night ends
posture differentia from sit is coarse without legs [m]
very big old house of rock — rock ref fine but royalty/fortification content lost
body-covering kind; 'very many small long things on the head' strains the lexicon
percept kind; the quality space (sweet/sour) stays gated
invisible material kind; prime-only sketch exists ('something in all places, people cannot see it') but NSM molecules it
hold in the hands while moving
instrument (sharp [m]) unminted; 'after this it is two things' captures result only
mechanism (wheels, pedalling) unminted; functional sketch only
story-kind; 'big bad animal-like thing in stories' is a stretch of KIND
percept determinable; determinates (round, flat) all unminted
effort-based prime-only sketch; NSM treats weight words as molecule-backed
verb sense dominates in TinyStories (landed on the ground) — end-of-flight schema
dog-sound sense dominates in TinyStories; tree-bark minority sense would be still-gated
small artifact kind; fastening mechanism under-determined
place where children are so that someone (kernel teacher) can teach them — kernel-v0 already carries teacher/learn
